title: Ananthapura Lake Temple
tagline: Ananthapura Lake Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Sri Ananthapadmanabha Swamy Temple, also known as the Ananthapura Lake Temple, is a Hindu temple dedicated to Anantha Padmanabhaswamy.
overview.description: Sri Ananthapadmanabha Swamy Temple, also known as the Ananthapura Lake Temple, is a Hindu temple dedicated to Anantha Padmanabhaswamy. It is located in Ananthapura village of Manjeshwaram taluk, within Kasaragod district, in the state of Kerala, India. The temple is located at the center of a rectangular tank—often referred to as a "lake"—and is the only temple of this kind in Kerala. As per some traditions, is believed to be the original seat (Moolasthanam) of Ananthapadmanabha Swami (Padmanabhaswamy Temple) Thiruvananthapuram.

topPlaces.name: Peral-Kannur
topPlaces.description: Kannur is a village located in the Puthige panchayath, in Kasaragod district of the Indian state of Kerala. Kannur is home to the Ananthapura Lake Temple (12.584209°N 74.981992°E / 12.584209; 74.981992), a Hindu temple located in the middle of a lake.

topPlaces.name: Pady
topPlaces.description: Pady is a village in Kasaragod district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Seethangoli
topPlaces.description: Seethangoli is a small village located 11 km north of Kasaragod town and 18 km south of Uppala in Kasaragod District, Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Uppala Gate
topPlaces.description: Uppala Gate is a small town in Uppala, Kasaragod district, Kerala. It is located about 1 kilometre (0.62 mi) north from the Uppala town.

topPlaces.name: Ichilampady
topPlaces.description: Ichilampady is a mid-sized village in Kasaragod district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Edanad, Kasaragod
topPlaces.description: Edanad is a village in Manjeshwaram Taluk of Kasaragod district in Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Shiribagilu
topPlaces.description: Shiribagilu is a village in Kasaragod district in the state of Kerala, India. It was the capital of Mayipadi Kingdom, a Nagavamasha clan established by Mayura Varman.

topPlaces.name: Patla, Kasaragod
topPlaces.description: Patla is a village in Kasaragod district in the state of Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ananthapura Lake Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ananthapura Lake Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ananthapura Lake Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (43 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (35 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ananthapura Lake Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ananthapura Lake Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ananthapura Lake Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Ananthapura Lake Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ananthapura Lake Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Peral-Kannur, Pady, Seethangoli, Uppala Gate, Ichilampady.
